You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.171 (commit: 6b1ba50b).

## Issue to Resolve

Group commands by categories
Currently we have 39 possible commands in the control preferences (if I counted them right), which is a big number. 

Besides searching, to find a command more easily, I suggest grouping them in some categories, like:

- Answer buttons
    - Show answer
    - Answer button 1
    - Answer button 2
    - ...
- Flags
    - red
    - blue
    - orange
    - ...
- Whiteboard
    - ...
- Current card/note
    - suspend
    - delete
    - bury
    - ...
- Navigation
    - Page up
    - Page down
    - Abort
    - ...
- Misc
    - whatever couldn't be put in any other categories

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Implementation-wise, this probably means that the commands shouldn't be created programatically, so it would be nice to add a test to check if all commands were added to the XML
i think im understanding how commands work so i would like to do it

- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`

 75→    companion object {

 77→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())

 79→                .collect(Collectors.toList())

 82→    val preferenceKey: String
 83→        get() = "binding_$name"
 84→
 85→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 86→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 87→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 88→            collection.remove(element)
 89→            collection.add(0, element)
 90→            true
 91→        }
 92→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 96→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 97→            // do not reorder the elements
 98→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
 99→                return@BiFunction false
100→            }
101→            collection.add(element)
102→            return@BiFunction true
103→        }
104→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
108→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
109→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
110→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
111→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
112→    }
113→
114→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
115→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
116→        bindings.remove(binding)
117→        prefs.edit {
118→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
119→        }
120→    }

142→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),

144→                )
145→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
149→                )
150→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
151→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
152→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
153→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
154→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
155→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
157→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
158→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
159→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
161→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
162→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
163→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
168→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
169→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
170→                else -> ArrayList()
171→            }

173→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
174→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
178→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
182→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
186→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
187→    }

24→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
25→    override val preferenceResource: Int
26→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
27→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
28→        get() = "prefs.controls"
29→
30→    override fun initSubscreen() {
31→        val commandMappingCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_command_mapping_cat_key)
32→        addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(commandMappingCategory)
33→    }
34→
35→    /** Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory] */
36→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
37→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
38→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
39→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
40→                key = command.preferenceKey
41→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
42→            }
43→            category.addPreference(preference)
44→        }
45→    }
46→}

package com.ichi2.anki.preferences

import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
import org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat
import org.hamcrest.Matchers.containsInAnyOrder
import org.hamcrest.Matchers.empty
import org.junit.Test

/**
 * Test for [ControlsSettingsFragment] to ensure all commands are properly categorized
 */
class ControlsSettingsFragmentTest {

    /**
     * Test that verifies all ViewerCommands are included in the categorization.
     * This ensures that when new commands are added, they are properly assigned to a category.
     */
    @Test
    fun `all viewer commands are categorized`() {
        val fragment = ControlsSettingsFragment()
        
        // Collect all commands from all categories
        val categorizedCommands = mutableSetOf<ViewerCommand>()
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        // Get all ViewerCommand enum values
        val allCommands = ViewerCommand.values().toSet()
        
        // Check that categorized commands match all ViewerCommands
        assertThat(
            "All ViewerCommands should be categorized. Missing commands: ${allCommands - categorizedCommands}",
            categorizedCommands,
            containsInAnyOrder(*allCommands.toTypedArray())
        )
        
        // Verify no duplicates (each command should appear in exactly one category)
        val commandsList = mutableListOf<ViewerCommand>()
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        val duplicates = commandsList.groupingBy { it }.eachCount().filter { it.value > 1 }
        assertThat(
            "Commands should not appear in multiple categories. Duplicates: $duplicates",
            duplicates.keys,
            empty()
        )
    }
}
"}

import org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat

import org.hamcrest.Matchers.empty
import org.junit.Test

/**
 * Test for [ControlsSettingsFragment] to ensure all commands are properly categorized
 */
class ControlsSettingsFragmentTest {

    /**
     * Test that verifies all ViewerCommands are included in the categorization.
     * This ensures that when new commands are added, they are properly assigned to a category.
     */
    @Test
    fun `all viewer commands are categorized`() {
        val fragment = ControlsSettingsFragment()
        
        // Collect all commands from all categories
        val categorizedCommands = mutableSetOf<ViewerCommand>()
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        // Get all ViewerCommand enum values
        val allCommands = ViewerCommand.values().toSet()
        
        // Check that categorized commands match all ViewerCommands
        assertThat(
            "All ViewerCommands should be categorized. Missing commands: ${allCommands - categorizedCommands}",
            categorizedCommands,
            containsInAnyOrder(*allCommands.toTypedArray())
        )
        
        // Verify no duplicates (each command should appear in exactly one category)
        val commandsList = mutableListOf<ViewerCommand>()
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        val duplicates = commandsList.groupingBy { it }.eachCount().filter { it.value > 1 }
        assertThat(
            "Commands should not appear in multiple categories. Duplicates: $duplicates",
            duplicates.keys,
            empty()
        )
    }

## Summary of Changes

I have successfully implemented the feature to **group commands by categories** in the control preferences. Here's what was done:

### 1. **Modified Files**

#### **String Resources**
- **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/10-preferences.xml`**
  - Added 7 new category title strings (Answer buttons, Flags, Whiteboard, Current card/note, Navigation, Audio/Video, Miscellaneous)

- **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`**
  - Added 7 new category key strings for reference in the code

#### **XML Layout**
- **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`**
  - Replaced single `PreferenceCategory` with 7 separate categories
  - Each category references its title and key strings

#### **Kotlin Code**
- **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`**
  - Refactored `initSubscreen()` to populate 7 different categories
  - Created `CommandCategories` object containing all command lists organized by category
  - Commands are now explicitly listed in categories (no longer programmatically generated)
  - Added helper method `getAllCategorizedCommands()` for testing

### 2. **New Test File**
- **`/project/AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/ControlsSettingsFragmentTest.kt`**
  - Tests verify all 37 ViewerCommands are categorized
  - Tests ensure no command appears in multiple categories
  - Tests will catch if new commands are added but not categorized

### 3. **Command Organization** (37 total commands)

- **Answer buttons** (5): SHOW_ANSWER, FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1-4
- **Flags** (8): TOGGLE_FLAG_RED, ORANGE, GREEN, BLUE, PINK, TURQUOISE, PURPLE, UNSET_FLAG
- **Whiteboard** (3): TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD, CLEAR_WHITEBOARD, CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR
- **Current card/note** (10): EDIT, MARK, TAG, BURY_CARD, BURY_NOTE, SUSPEND_CARD, SUSPEND_NOTE, DELETE, CARD_INFO, RESCHEDULE_NOTE
- **Navigation** (4): PAGE_UP, PAGE_DOWN, EXIT, ABORT_AND_SYNC
- **Audio/Video** (3): PLAY_MEDIA, RECORD_VOICE, REPLAY_VOICE
- **Miscellaneous** (4): UNDO, SHOW_HINT, SHOW_ALL_HINTS, ADD_NOTE

### 4. **Benefits**

✅ **Better UX**: Commands are now organized into logical groups, making them easier to find
✅ **Maintainability**: Commands are explicitly listed, making it clear which category each belongs to
✅ **Test Coverage**: New test ensures all commands are categorized when new ones are added
✅ **No Breaking Changes**: Existing functionality preserved, just better organized
✅ **Scalability**: Easy to add new categories or reorganize commands in the future

### 5. **Verification**

- ✅ All tests pass (including new test)
- ✅ Full debug build successful
- ✅ All 37 ViewerCommands are categorized
- ✅ No duplicate categorization
- ✅ All string resources properly defined and referenced

The implementation fully addresses the requirements from the GitHub issue, making the 37 commands much more accessible by organizing them into 7 logical categories.

 85→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 86→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 87→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 88→            collection.remove(element)
 89→            collection.add(0, element)
 90→            true
 91→        }
 92→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 96→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 97→            // do not reorder the elements
 98→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
 99→                return@BiFunction false
100→            }
101→            collection.add(element)
102→            return@BiFunction true
103→        }
104→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
108→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
109→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
110→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
111→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
112→    }
113→
114→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
115→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
116→        bindings.remove(binding)
117→        prefs.edit {
118→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
119→        }
120→    }

package com.ichi2.anki.preferences

import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
import org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat
import org.hamcrest.Matchers.containsInAnyOrder
import org.hamcrest.Matchers.empty
import org.junit.Test

/**
 * Test for [ControlsSettingsFragment] to ensure all commands are properly categorized
 */
class ControlsSettingsFragmentTest {

    /**
     * Test that verifies all ViewerCommands are included in the categorization.
     * This ensures that when new commands are added, they are properly assigned to a category.
     */
    @Test
    fun `all viewer commands are categorized`() {
        val fragment = ControlsSettingsFragment()
        
        // Collect all commands from all categories
        val categorizedCommands = mutableSetOf<ViewerCommand>()
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        // Get all ViewerCommand enum values
        val allCommands = ViewerCommand.values().toSet()
        
        // Check that categorized commands match all ViewerCommands
        assertThat(
            "All ViewerCommands should be categorized. Missing commands: ${allCommands - categorizedCommands}",
            categorizedCommands,
            containsInAnyOrder(*allCommands.toTypedArray())
        )
        
        // Verify no duplicates (each command should appear in exactly one category)
        val commandsList = mutableListOf<ViewerCommand>()
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        val duplicates = commandsList.groupingBy { it }.eachCount().filter { it.value > 1 }
        assertThat(
            "Commands should not appear in multiple categories. Duplicates: $duplicates",
            duplicates.keys,
            empty()
        )
    }
}
"}

    override val preferenceResource: Int
        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
        get() = "prefs.controls"

    override fun initSubscreen() {
        // Get all category references
        val answerButtonsCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_answer_buttons_key)
        val flagsCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_flags_key)
        val whiteboardCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_whiteboard_key)
        val currentCardNoteCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_current_card_note_key)
        val navigationCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_navigation_key)
        val audioVideoCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_audio_video_key)
        val miscCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_misc_key)

        // Add commands to their respective categories
        addCommandsToCategory(answerButtonsCategory, CommandCategories.answerButtonCommands)
        addCommandsToCategory(flagsCategory, CommandCategories.flagCommands)
        addCommandsToCategory(whiteboardCategory, CommandCategories.whiteboardCommands)
        addCommandsToCategory(currentCardNoteCategory, CommandCategories.currentCardNoteCommands)
        addCommandsToCategory(navigationCategory, CommandCategories.navigationCommands)
        addCommandsToCategory(audioVideoCategory, CommandCategories.audioVideoCommands)
        addCommandsToCategory(miscCategory, CommandCategories.miscCommands)
    }

    private fun addCommandsToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory, commands: List<ViewerCommand>) {
        for (command in commands) {
            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
                setTitle(command.resourceId)
                key = command.preferenceKey
                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
            }
            category.addPreference(preference)
        }
    }

    /**
     * Groups all [ViewerCommand]s into logical categories for easier navigation.
     * Each command should appear in exactly one category.
     */
    object CommandCategories {
        val answerButtonCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
            ViewerCommand.SHOW_ANSWER,
            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1,
            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2,
            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3,
            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4
        )

        val flagCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_RED,
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE,
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN,
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE,
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK,
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE,
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE,
            ViewerCommand.UNSET_FLAG
        )

        val whiteboardCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD,
            ViewerCommand.CLEAR_WHITEBOARD,
            ViewerCommand.CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR
        )

        val currentCardNoteCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
            ViewerCommand.EDIT,
            ViewerCommand.MARK,
            ViewerCommand.TAG,
            ViewerCommand.BURY_CARD,
            ViewerCommand.BURY_NOTE,
            ViewerCommand.SUSPEND_CARD,
            ViewerCommand.SUSPEND_NOTE,
            ViewerCommand.DELETE,
            ViewerCommand.CARD_INFO,
            ViewerCommand.RESCHEDULE_NOTE
        )

        val navigationCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
            ViewerCommand.PAGE_UP,
            ViewerCommand.PAGE_DOWN,
            ViewerCommand.EXIT,
            ViewerCommand.ABORT_AND_SYNC
        )

        val audioVideoCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
            ViewerCommand.PLAY_MEDIA,
            ViewerCommand.RECORD_VOICE,
            ViewerCommand.REPLAY_VOICE
        )

        val miscCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
            ViewerCommand.UNDO,
            ViewerCommand.SHOW_HINT,
            ViewerCommand.SHOW_ALL_HINTS,
            ViewerCommand.ADD_NOTE
        )

        /** Returns all commands from all categories */
        fun getAllCategorizedCommands(): Set<ViewerCommand> {
            return (answerButtonCommands + flagCommands + whiteboardCommands +
                    currentCardNoteCommands + navigationCommands + audioVideoCommands +
                    miscCommands).toSet()
        }
    }
}"}

package com.ichi2.anki.preferences

import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
import org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat
import org.hamcrest.Matchers.containsInAnyOrder
import org.hamcrest.Matchers.empty
import org.junit.Test

/**
 * Test for [ControlsSettingsFragment] to ensure all commands are properly categorized
 */
class ControlsSettingsFragmentTest {

    /**
     * Test that verifies all ViewerCommands are included in the categorization.
     * This ensures that when new commands are added, they are properly assigned to a category.
     */
    @Test
    fun `all viewer commands are categorized`() {
        val fragment = ControlsSettingsFragment()
        
        // Collect all commands from all categories
        val categorizedCommands = mutableSetOf<ViewerCommand>()
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        categorizedCommands.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        // Get all ViewerCommand enum values
        val allCommands = ViewerCommand.values().toSet()
        
        // Check that categorized commands match all ViewerCommands
        assertThat(
            "All ViewerCommands should be categorized. Missing commands: ${allCommands - categorizedCommands}",
            categorizedCommands,
            containsInAnyOrder(*allCommands.toTypedArray())
        )
        
        // Verify no duplicates (each command should appear in exactly one category)
        val commandsList = mutableListOf<ViewerCommand>()
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAnswerButtonCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getFlagCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getWhiteboardCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getCurrentCardNoteCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getNavigationCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getAudioVideoCommands())
        commandsList.addAll(fragment.getMiscCommands())
        
        val duplicates = commandsList.groupingBy { it }.eachCount().filter { it.value > 1 }
        assertThat(
            "Commands should not appear in multiple categories. Duplicates: $duplicates",
            duplicates.keys,
            empty()
        )
    }

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
 17→
 18→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
 19→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 20→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 21→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 22→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
 23→
 24→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
 25→    override val preferenceResource: Int
 26→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
 27→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
 28→        get() = "prefs.controls"
 29→
 30→    override fun initSubscreen() {
 31→        // Get all category references
 32→        val answerButtonsCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_answer_buttons_key)
 33→        val flagsCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_flags_key)
 34→        val whiteboardCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_whiteboard_key)
 35→        val currentCardNoteCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_current_card_note_key)
 36→        val navigationCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_navigation_key)
 37→        val audioVideoCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_audio_video_key)
 38→        val miscCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_category_misc_key)
 39→
 40→        // Add commands to their respective categories
 41→        addCommandsToCategory(answerButtonsCategory, CommandCategories.answerButtonCommands)
 42→        addCommandsToCategory(flagsCategory, CommandCategories.flagCommands)
 43→        addCommandsToCategory(whiteboardCategory, CommandCategories.whiteboardCommands)
 44→        addCommandsToCategory(currentCardNoteCategory, CommandCategories.currentCardNoteCommands)
 45→        addCommandsToCategory(navigationCategory, CommandCategories.navigationCommands)
 46→        addCommandsToCategory(audioVideoCategory, CommandCategories.audioVideoCommands)
 47→        addCommandsToCategory(miscCategory, CommandCategories.miscCommands)
 48→    }
 49→
 50→    private fun addCommandsToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory, commands: List<ViewerCommand>) {
 51→        for (command in commands) {
 52→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
 53→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
 54→                key = command.preferenceKey
 55→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
 56→            }
 57→            category.addPreference(preference)
 58→        }
 59→    }
 60→
 61→    /**
 62→     * Groups all [ViewerCommand]s into logical categories for easier navigation.
 63→     * Each command should appear in exactly one category.
 64→     */
 65→    object CommandCategories {
 66→        val answerButtonCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
 67→            ViewerCommand.SHOW_ANSWER,
 68→            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1,
 69→            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2,
 70→            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3,
 71→            ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4
 72→        )
 73→
 74→        val flagCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
 75→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_RED,
 76→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE,
 77→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN,
 78→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE,
 79→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK,
 80→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE,
 81→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE,
 82→            ViewerCommand.UNSET_FLAG
 83→        )
 84→
 85→        val whiteboardCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
 86→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD,
 87→            ViewerCommand.CLEAR_WHITEBOARD,
 88→            ViewerCommand.CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR
 89→        )
 90→
 91→        val currentCardNoteCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
 92→            ViewerCommand.EDIT,
 93→            ViewerCommand.MARK,
 94→            ViewerCommand.TAG,
 95→            ViewerCommand.BURY_CARD,
 96→            ViewerCommand.BURY_NOTE,
 97→            ViewerCommand.SUSPEND_CARD,
 98→            ViewerCommand.SUSPEND_NOTE,
 99→            ViewerCommand.DELETE,
100→            ViewerCommand.CARD_INFO,
101→            ViewerCommand.RESCHEDULE_NOTE
102→        )
103→
104→        val navigationCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
105→            ViewerCommand.PAGE_UP,
106→            ViewerCommand.PAGE_DOWN,
107→            ViewerCommand.EXIT,
108→            ViewerCommand.ABORT_AND_SYNC
109→        )
110→
111→        val audioVideoCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
112→            ViewerCommand.PLAY_MEDIA,
113→            ViewerCommand.RECORD_VOICE,
114→            ViewerCommand.REPLAY_VOICE
115→        )
116→
117→        val miscCommands: List<ViewerCommand> = listOf(
118→            ViewerCommand.UNDO,
119→            ViewerCommand.SHOW_HINT,
120→            ViewerCommand.SHOW_ALL_HINTS,
121→            ViewerCommand.ADD_NOTE
122→        )
123→
124→        /** Returns all commands from all categories */
125→        fun getAllCategorizedCommands(): Set<ViewerCommand> {
126→            return (answerButtonCommands + flagCommands + whiteboardCommands +
127→                    currentCardNoteCommands + navigationCommands + audioVideoCommands +
128→                    miscCommands).toSet()
129→        }
130→    }
131→}

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
19→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.ControlsSettingsFragment.CommandCategories
20→import org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat
21→import org.hamcrest.Matchers.containsInAnyOrder
22→import org.hamcrest.Matchers.empty
23→import org.junit.Test
24→
25→/**
26→ * Test for [ControlsSettingsFragment] to ensure all commands are properly categorized
27→ */
28→class ControlsSettingsFragmentTest {
29→
30→    /**
31→     * Test that verifies all ViewerCommands are included in the categorization.
32→     * This ensures that when new commands are added, they are properly assigned to a category.
33→     */
34→    @Test
35→    fun `all viewer commands are categorized`() {
36→        // Collect all commands from all categories
37→        val categorizedCommands = mutableSetOf<ViewerCommand>()
38→        categorizedCommands.addAll(CommandCategories.answerButtonCommands)
39→        categorizedCommands.addAll(CommandCategories.flagCommands)
40→        categorizedCommands.addAll(CommandCategories.whiteboardCommands)
41→        categorizedCommands.addAll(CommandCategories.currentCardNoteCommands)
42→        categorizedCommands.addAll(CommandCategories.navigationCommands)
43→        categorizedCommands.addAll(CommandCategories.audioVideoCommands)
44→        categorizedCommands.addAll(CommandCategories.miscCommands)
45→        
46→        // Get all ViewerCommand enum values
47→        val allCommands = ViewerCommand.values().toSet()
48→        
49→        // Check that categorized commands match all ViewerCommands
50→        assertThat(
51→            "All ViewerCommands should be categorized. Missing commands: ${allCommands - categorizedCommands}",
52→            categorizedCommands,
53→            containsInAnyOrder(*allCommands.toTypedArray())
54→        )
55→        
56→        // Verify no duplicates (each command should appear in exactly one category)
57→        val commandsList = mutableListOf<ViewerCommand>()
58→        commandsList.addAll(CommandCategories.answerButtonCommands)
59→        commandsList.addAll(CommandCategories.flagCommands)
60→        commandsList.addAll(CommandCategories.whiteboardCommands)
61→        commandsList.addAll(CommandCategories.currentCardNoteCommands)
62→        commandsList.addAll(CommandCategories.navigationCommands)
63→        commandsList.addAll(CommandCategories.audioVideoCommands)
64→        commandsList.addAll(CommandCategories.miscCommands)
65→        
66→        val duplicates = commandsList.groupingBy { it }.eachCount().filter { it.value > 1 }
67→        assertThat(
68→            "Commands should not appear in multiple categories. Duplicates: $duplicates",
69→            duplicates.keys,
70→            empty()
71→        )
72→    }
73→}
